title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland (chapters I–III)
author: Lewis Carroll
note: Verbatim opening three chapters ('Down the Rabbit-Hole', 'The Pool of Tears', 'A Caucus-Race and a Long Tale'), one chapter per spread with paragraph blanks collapsed (mirrors the wizard-of-oz fixture's structure). Sits cleanly inside the 5,000–10,000 chapter-band target. A second chapter-band fixture alongside Oz, distinct register: dialogue- and exclamation-dense.
syntaxNote: Notably exclamation-heavy — engine counts ~75 exclamatory of ~260 sentences (Alice's many 'Oh dear!' / 'Curiouser and curiouser!' outbursts), by far the highest exclamatory COUNT in the corpus (and the highest share among the prose fixtures; owl-and-pussycat's 3/10 share is marginally higher but a small-sample artifact). A useful counterpoint to Oz's declarative-dominant prose. Bounds are regression bands around the audited values.
